app.name: 1C AI Cockpit
app.tagline: Local тАФ no data leaves this machine

cockpit.title: Cockpit
cockpit.noQueriesHint: Once you wire up Search and Help pages, your last 5 queries will appear here for quick re-runs.

1c-code-index.name: 1C Code Index
1c-code-index.description: BSL code navigation, object metadata, call graph

1c-prompt-gallery.name: 1C Prompt Gallery
1c-prompt-gallery.description: Prompt catalog exposed as callable tools

1c-ibcmd.name: 1C ibcmd
1c-ibcmd.description: Phase B export/import (experimental, disabled by default)

search.description: Local text, grep, and MCP tool search across the indexed 1C dump.
search.queryDescription: Choose a mode and send a real MCP request.
search.emptyDescription: Results from MCP tools appear here.

help.description: Local 1C help browser backed by help-index-mcp.
help.emptyDescription: Run the help-index MCP reindex tool or check generated/help-index/help-index.db.
help.noTopicSelectedDescription: Pick a topic from the tree or search the help index.

risk.title: Risk scan
risk.description: Surface suspicious patterns across the indexed 1C configuration.
risk.noFindingsDescription: Click Run risk scan to analyze the indexed dump.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Local paths, per-server toggles, and metadata.
settings.pathsDescription: Local directories the Cockpit reads from.
settings.serversDescription: Per-server enable / disable. Disabled servers are not started by Start all.
settings.aboutLicense: License: MIT (Cockpit scaffold) тАФ see repo for upstream licenses.

field.codeIndexHomeDescription: Where bsl-indexer writes its SQLite and cache.
field.helpDbPathDescription: Path to the help-index SQLite file.
field.apiKeyDescription: LLM provider key. OpenAI-compatible APIs work (OpenAI, OpenRouter, LM Studio, Ollama).
field.baseUrlDescription: OpenAI-compatible API endpoint. Default https://api.openai.com/v1. For local: http://localhost:1234/v1.

settings.aiDescription: The API key is used by the built-in chat. It is stored only locally.

chat.title: Chat
chat.description: Ask the local AI about the indexed 1C dump. The model can search files and answer with references.
chat.apiHint: Configure the API key in Settings → AI. The model can call 1c-code-index, 1c-skills, 1c-help-index.
chat.empty: Ask a question about the 1C dump. For example: "Where is the total amount calculated in the sales document?"

onboarding.title: Onboarding
onboarding.description: Five validation steps to get the Cockpit ready.
onboarding.welcomeDescription: A local GUI for the 1C AI Workbench. No data leaves this machine.

welcomeBullets.servers: Start, stop, and inspect the 5 Cockpit MCP servers.
welcomeBullets.search: Run local search, help lookup, and risk scans through real MCP calls.
welcomeBullets.validate: Validate the dump directory before starting the first index.

onboarding.dumpDescription: Folder containing the exported 1C configuration. Read-only.
onboarding.configBlocked: Workbench configuration is blocked. Fix the checklist before indexing.
onboarding.serversDescription: The list mirrors the 5-server Cockpit catalog and maps to matching entries in opencode.jsonc.
onboarding.doneDescription: Validation is complete. Open the Cockpit and start the MCP servers.
